tables.description: This subject phenotypes data table contains demographic information (gender, age, ancestry, education), lifestyle and environment information (cigarette smoking, caffeine consumption, alcohol consumption, daily medications, handedness), history and status of tremor (age when symptoms first appeared, details of essential tremor diagnosis, medication use for tremor, surgery status for tremor, hand trembling), and other medical history (Parkinson's diagnosis, dystonia status, hyperthyroidism status).

tables.description: This subject phenotypes data table contains demographic information (gender, ancestry), phenotype with respect to essential tremor, age at exam, and age/estimated age at tremor onset.
